post.content:
For the ones that were asking clarifications on the second problem. From what I understand from the code the problem could be rephrased as:

Given the root of an n-ary tree A and a pointer to a node B_i of an n-ary tree B which is a clone of A, find the corresponding node to B_i, A_i, on A. The n-ary tree may be represented as:
```
class TreeNode {
  public TreeNode parent;
  public List<TreeNode> children;
}
```
 
Example

A:
```
          a
        /  \  \
      b    c   d
     / \
    e   f
```
B:
```
           a'
        /  \   \
      b'    c'  d'
     / \
    e'   f'
```
The function would receive a (the root of A) and f` (one of the leaves of B) and it should return f (the corresponding leaf in A).
[@dhruv459](https://leetcode.com/dhruv459) [@popeye1](https://leetcode.com/popeye1) Let me know if it is clear
[@AswaniG](https://leetcode.com/AswaniG)  2nd question is a bit of unclear. Please explain. Thanks!
Can you please explain the 2nd question?
